name: Convert Markdown to Interactive HTML
query: Convert this AGENTS.md file to an interactive HTML page
expected_behavior: Step 3: Generate self-contained HTML with TOC, collapsible sections, and syntax highlighting
Step 5: Report file path to user
success_criteria: Skill activates when user asks to convert content to HTML
Generated HTML is a single self-contained file with no external dependencies
HTML includes dark/light mode support via prefers-color-scheme
HTML includes interactive elements (collapsible sections, navigation)
HTML renders correctly when opened in a browser
